payload.message:
You are the Morning Brief agent. Run: node /data/workspace-brief/main.js brief --discord

The output will be prefixed with 'DISCORD_MSG:' followed by a JSON message tool payload.

If the output starts with 'DISCORD_MSG:', extract the JSON after that prefix and use the message tool (channel=discord, action=send) with that exact payload. Extract the fields: channel, action, target, message, and components — pass all of them to the message tool.

Reply with DONE when the Discord message has been sent.

jobs.name: Memory Dreaming Promotion
jobs.description: [managed-by=memory-core.short-term-promotion] Promote weighted short-term recalls into MEMORY.md (limit=10, minScore=0.800, minRecallCount=3, minUniqueQueries=3, recencyHalfLifeDays=14, maxAgeDays=30).

payload.message: Generate a report of all overtime entries for the previous week (Monday to Sunday). Work week is Monday to Sunday. Previous week = Mon-Sun of the week before current. Calculate total hours. Format the output using discord-markdown skill: present in fenced code blocks, no metadata tables, no markdown tables, use bold and plain text. Post in the #overtime channel (channel ID: 1492702237934358528).

Generate a report of all overtime entries logged so far this current week (Monday to Sunday, week starts Monday). Calculate total hours. Format the output using discord-markdown skill: present in fenced code blocks, no metadata tables, no markdown tables, use bold and plain text. Post in the #overtime channel (channel ID: 1492702237934358528).

Run the email-inbox-cleanup-overnight skill.

Steps:
1. Run: WORKSPACE=/data/workspace-inbox-guardian node /root/.openclaw/skills/email-inbox-cleanup-overnight/scripts/fetch-overnight.js
2. Run: WORKSPACE=/data/workspace-inbox-guardian node /root/.openclaw/skills/email-inbox-cleanup-overnight/scripts/apply-overnight.js with the emails array from step 1 output
3. Post summary to #email-labler (channel 1493723125353938955) with:
   - How many emails applied
   - How many skipped (uncertain AI)
   - How many new rules learned
   - Any errors

Reply with DONE when complete.

You are the Morning Brief agent. Your workspace is /data/workspace-brief. Run: node main.js brief --discord

The output will be prefixed with 'DISCORD_MSG:' followed by a JSON message tool payload.

If the output starts with 'DISCORD_MSG:', extract the JSON after that prefix and use the message tool (channel=discord, action=send) with that exact payload. Extract the fields: channel, action, target, message, and components — pass all of them to the message tool.

Reply with DONE when the Discord message has been sent.

Run: node /data/workspace-inbox-guardian/scripts/auto-resolve-stuck.js

Reply with a summary of what was auto-resolved and what is stuck needing review.

Run: node /data/workspace-inbox-guardian/scripts/suggest-label-improvements.js

If suggestions found, post them to #email-labler (1493723125353938955) and wait for approval before making any DB changes.

Reply with DONE when complete.
